name: Dead World: La Argentina Muerta
short_description: Dead World is a first-person shooter game set in a post-apocalyptic world, where you follow Miguel's journey to return home to a war-torn Argentina.
detailed_description:
Dead World is a first-person shooter set in a post-apocalyptic Argentina.

It takes place 30 years after World War III.

Miguel has to go to Rosario, Santa Fe Province to see what happened to a shipment that was supposed to arrive. During the trip, he gets trapped in the city dominated by "Las Serpientes" a group that controls the only bridge between Rosario and Entre Rios, his home.

MAIN FEATURES

  • Deep Exploration: Explore detailed environments in search of resources vital to your survival.

  • Challenging Combat: Face off against mutants and bandits using a wide variety of weapons.

  • Roguelite Mode: Test your skills in "A Cool Rogue," where survival depends on your decisions and abilities.

  • 1v1 Mode: Face off against another player in 1v1 mode and prove you're the toughest in the dead world.

Immerse yourself in Dead World and discover if you can survive in a world where every step could be your last.

Developed by a single person

The story is currently 66% complete and will be updated and updated with new content over time.

Dead World is a project made with love and a lot of hard work. If you like what you see, your support helps me continue creating.

Thank you

Sincerely, Juani from Milanesa Studio

supported_languages: Spanish - Latin America, English, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil
